findings.description: The knowledge file states 「この設定がないとページング動作になる」 (if this setting is missing, paging behavior results), but the source only says the setMax call is 「必須」 (required) for no-paging use. The source does not state what happens when this setting is omitted.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「検索結果の取得件数(1ページの表示件数)に検索結果の最大件数(上限)を設定する。ページングを使用しないため下記の設定が必須となる。」 — states it is required, but makes no claim about the behavior when omitted.

findings.description: The source contains two substantial h3-level sub-sections under 「検索結果の並び替え」: 「検索処理の実装方法」(===) and 「listSearchSortSubmitタグ」(===), each with significant content including code examples and tables. These are merged into a single s1 section which is well over 2000 characters. Per V3 criteria (h2 >= 2000 chars with h3 sub-sections not split), these should be separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: 「検索結果の並び替え」(---), 「検索処理の実装方法」(===), 「listSearchSortSubmitタグ」(===). Section count 3 vs source headings 5+.

findings.description: The hints for s2 are missing `W11AC01Action`, which appears in the source section as the Action class implementing the no-paging pattern (class definition with DbAccessSupport and the setMax call).
The hints for s3 are missing `ApplicationException`, `MessageUtil`, and `MessageLevel`, all of which are PascalCase class names used in the Action class implementation example in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: 「} catch (TooManyResultException e) { throw new ApplicationException(MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00035", e.getMaxResultCount())); }」
